imaplib/error.name: error
imaplib/error.description: Exception raised on any errors. The reason for the exception is passed to the constructor as a string.

info.excerpt: Exception raised on any errors. The reason for the exception is passed to the constructor as a string.

imaplib/IMAP4/enable.name: enable
imaplib/IMAP4/enable.description: Enable capability (see RFC 5161). Most capabilities do not need to be enabled. Currently only the UTF8=ACCEPT capability is supported (see RFC 6855). Added in version 3.5: The enable() method itself, and RFC 6855 support.

info.excerpt: Enable capability (see RFC 5161). Most capabilities do not need to be enabled. Currently only the UTF8=ACCEPT capability is supported (see RFC 6855). Added in version 3.5: The enable() method itself, ...

imaplib/IMAP4/expunge.name: expunge
imaplib/IMAP4/expunge.description: Permanently remove deleted items from selected mailbox. Generates an EXPUNGE response for each deleted message. Returned data contains a list of EXPUNGE message numbers in order received.

info.excerpt: Permanently remove deleted items from selected mailbox. Generates an EXPUNGE response for each deleted message. Returned data contains a list of EXPUNGE message numbers in order received.
